$comment: The authoritative list of Stratos Games Factory agents. Swarm mode (CLAUDE.md) is the primary dispatch mechanism. Cron-based shell scripts are deprecated.

agents.name: builder
agents.description: Processes build-request issues. In swarm mode, each issue is handled by a dedicated subagent that reads the game's CLAUDE.md and opens a PR.

agents.name: council
agents.description: Reviews the week's factory activity, updates COUNCIL.md, files council-labeled issues for architectural improvements.

agents.name: qa
agents.description: Playwright smoke tests on every PR: page loads, no console errors, game container present, screenshot artifact. Zero Claude tokens.

agents.name: content
agents.description: Generates up to 5 new content ideas per game and files them as build-request issues. Never writes code.

agents.name: competitor
agents.description: Scans trending puzzle/casual games via web search, files market-intel issues with 3 specific mechanic suggestions per game.

agents.name: platform
agents.description: On ship-it release: npx cap sync, attempts gradle assembleRelease, files release-ready issue with APK/AAB links.

agents.name: product
agents.description: Analyzes player data from analytics-data issues (Ripon) or Firebase CLI. Files data-backed build-request issues with label product-data.

agents.name: monetization
agents.description: Reviews ad placement config in game code, cross-references with casual game best practices, files optimization issues with label monetization-data.

agents.name: ua
agents.description: Generates App Store/Play Store description variants, ASO keyword sets, and screenshot composition suggestions. Files ua-assets issues.

agents.name: aso
agents.description: Single-purpose ASO brain. Coordinates 4 sub-specialists (game-introspector, state-reacher, hook-designer, carousel-composer) to produce store-submission-ready screenshot carousels at platform maximum (10 App Store / 8 Play). Charter: brain/aso/README.md. v8 introspection-driven: brain/aso/V8-INTROSPECTION-PROPOSAL.md.

agents.name: aso-game-introspector
agents.description: Reads game source on first encounter or after merges; produces brain/aso/inventories/<game>.md cataloging exciting state primitives, exposed dev hooks, renderer entry points, theme tokens, and addiction hypothesis. Charter: agents/aso/game-introspector/README.md.

agents.name: aso-state-reacher
agents.description: Given a target marketing state, produces a Playwright sequence using existing primitives, OR a minimal-PR proposal, OR a three-paths-failed report. Bias: never declare blocked without exhausting three crafty paths. Charter: agents/aso/state-reacher/README.md.

agents.name: aso-hook-designer
agents.description: Refines state-reacher's Path 2 proposals into a single consolidated PR description per game. Bias: ONE consolidated window.__game_dev hook over N URL parser branches. Charter: agents/aso/hook-designer/README.md.

agents.name: aso-carousel-composer
agents.description: Composes generated <game>-v6.json from inventory + reach-results + per-genre hook-ordering canon. Validates denylist + hero-shot rule + density floor before write. Charter: agents/aso/carousel-composer/README.md.
